title: erigeron eriocalyx
intro: Erigeron eriocalyx, also known as the Santa Cruz fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the coastal scrub areas of central and southern California, United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erigeron eriocalyx include its ability to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for skin and gastrointestinal health. Erigeron eriocalyx can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
